name: Highlight Tech Corp.
summary: Highlight Tech Corp. designs, manufactures, and sells integrated vacuum coating chamber solutions for original equipment manufacturers worldwide. It offers cylindrical, box, D shape, spherical, polygon, bell jar, large, and aluminum vacuum chambers, as well as vacuum modules and systems; vacuum chamber kits; ultra-high vacuum chambers; and vacuum valves, such as vacuum poppet valves, aluminum alloy angle valves, vacuum gate valves, vacuum butterfly valves, rectangular gate valves, pendulum valves, teflon coating vacuum valves, vacuum ball valves, vacuum check valves, vent valves, metal valves, and vacuum valve kits. The company also provides vacuum components, including elbows-tees-crosses, vacuum flanges, teflon bellows, hydroformed vacuum bellows, centering rings, vacuum clamps, adaptor fittings, vacuum viewports, vacuum feedthroughs, and vacuum accessories, as well as KF, ISO, and CF components; and vacuum pumps comprising edwards turbomolecular pumps, scroll and refurbished vacuum pumps, and Ebara dry pump repair kits. In addition, it offers sanitary fittings comprising ferrule blanks, fittings, gaskets, clamps, and adaptors, as well as sanitary valves; perfluoroelastomer O'rings; IC dispensing machines; and centrifugal vacuum mixers. Further, the company provides vacuum pump and valves overhaul services; and refurbished vacuum pump services. Highlight Tech Corp. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.
